questions.question: What is the role of the Realtek RTK Audio Driver (rtsupx) in the audio update failure?
questions.justification: The synthesis text explains that the rtsupx driver is a Realtek USB driver used to support cameras, hubs, and audio devices, and that it is removed during audio updates but not removed after camera updates, which leads to the audio update failure.

questions.question: What is the impact of not removing the rtsupx driver after a camera update?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that if the rtsupx driver is not removed after a camera update, it will cause the next audio update to fail.

questions.question: What are the steps to manually remove the rtsupx driver?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides the steps to manually remove the rtsupx driver, which are to run the commands `sc stop rtsupx` and `sc delete rtsupx`.
